---
title: "Solid Rocket Internal Ballistics"
subtitle: "Theory ⋅ Equations ⋅ Numerical Simulation"
author: "Troy Altus"
date: today
---

## Welcome

This book is a comprehensive guide to the **internal ballistics** of solid propellant rocket motors. It covers the fundamental theory, mathematical derivations, and practical numerical simulation using Python.

### What This Book Covers

- Propellant characteristics and burn rate laws
- Grain geometry and burnback simulation
- Chamber pressure dynamics and K/N ratio
- Erosive burning, ignition transients, and nozzle performance
- A complete 0D internal ballistics simulator

### How to Use This Book

**Start here:**
- [Chapter 1: Introduction](chapters/01-intro.qmd) — Motivation and overview
- [Chapter 5: Internal Ballistics](chapters/05-internal-ballistics.qmd) — Core 0D model
- [Chapter 10: Full Simulation](chapters/10-full-simulation.qmd) — Complete working model

Use the **left sidebar** to navigate through all chapters and appendices.

The accompanying Python code (`code/`) will eventually provide a reusable simulation library.

:::{.callout-tip}
**Tip**: Many chapters contain executable code examples. You can run them directly in the HTML version using `quarto preview`.
:::

---

**Repository**: https://github.com/altustd/solid-rocket-internal-ballistics
